scripts.mobile:build: npm run build:mobile && npx cap copy
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.android:run: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.android:apk: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.ios:sync: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap sync ios
scripts.release: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
